name: Kontent.ai
description: Enterprise headless CMS with AI-powered content operations and collaborative workflows

description.value: Enterprise headless CMS with AI-powered content operations and collaborative workflows

repository.comment: Closed-source SaaS platform; SDKs and tools are open-source on GitHub

initial-release.comment: Originally launched as Kentico Cloud in 2016; rebranded to Kentico Kontent in 2019, then to Kontent.ai in 2022

github-stars.comment: Closed-source SaaS; SDKs available at github.com/kontent-ai

primary-language.comment: Backend is proprietary; SDKs available in TypeScript, .NET, Java, PHP

database-support.comment: Fully managed SaaS with proprietary infrastructure

api-type.comment: Delivery REST API and Delivery GraphQL API; Management API is REST-only

multi-tenancy.comment: Supports multiple environments and projects within a single subscription

static-site-generation.comment: JAMstack compatible; works with Gatsby, Next.js, Nuxt, and other SSG frameworks

edge-deployment.comment: CDN delivery included; cached requests served from edge

content-types.comment: Full content type builder with custom content models

custom-fields.comment: Extensive element types including text, rich text, assets, date/time, number, linked items, taxonomy, multiple choice, and custom elements

field-types.comment: Supports text, rich text, assets, linked items, taxonomy, multiple choice, date/time, number, and custom elements

content-relationships.comment: Linked items element for content relationships; subpages element for hierarchical content

nested-components.comment: Content type snippets for reusable element groups; components can be embedded in rich text

localization.comment: Full multi-language support with language variants, fallbacks, and localizable/non-localizable elements; 20+ language support

content-validation.comment: Required fields, element limitations, and validation rules

embedded-interactives.comment: Custom elements allow embedding interactive widgets and third-party integrations

content-versioning.comment: Version history with ability to compare and restore previous versions

draft-publish.comment: Full draft/published workflow with Preview API for draft content

scheduled-publishing.comment: Schedule content to publish at specific dates and times

approval-workflows.comment: Customizable multi-step workflows with role-based permissions; multiple workflows per project

content-locking.comment: Real-time collaboration prevents conflicts; workflow steps control who can edit

audit-logging.comment: Tracks content changes and user actions; Mission Control for operational visibility

media-library.comment: Built-in asset library for images, videos, documents; searchable and organizeable

image-transformations.comment: Image Transformation API for real-time resize, crop, format conversion, and optimization

external-media-storage.comment: Integrations with Cloudinary, Bynder, and other DAM platforms

video-support.comment: Video upload supported in asset library

svg-support.comment: SVG files can be uploaded as assets

folder-organization.comment: Assets can be organized in folders and categories; taxonomy-based organization available

role-based-access.comment: User roles with configurable permissions; workflow-based access control

granular-permissions.comment: Content type and content group level permissions; workflow step restrictions

sso-saml.comment: Single sign-on available for enterprise customers

team-collaboration.comment: Real-time collaboration, comments, suggestions, task assignment, and notifications

audience-restrictions.comment: No built-in audience or membership restrictions; content access controlled at delivery level

typescript-sdk.comment: Official TypeScript SDKs for Delivery and Management APIs; Model Generator for type generation

content-type-sdk.comment: Management SDK allows programmatic content model creation and modification

cli-tools.comment: Official CLI for migrations and content model management

local-development.comment: Preview API and Smart Link SDK for local development with live preview

webhooks.comment: Webhooks for content changes, workflow transitions, and management events

plugin-system.comment: Custom elements for extending the UI; integrations marketplace

admin-ui-customization.comment: Custom elements, content groups, and guidelines for customizing the editorial experience

documentation-quality.comment: Comprehensive documentation with tutorials, API references, SDKs, and examples; active learning portal

frontend-frameworks.comment: Official integrations and sample apps for Next.js, Nuxt, and Gatsby; works with any framework via APIs

search-integration.comment: Official Algolia integration; example implementations available

preview-mode.comment: Live preview with Smart Link SDK, Web Spotlight for in-context editing, Preview API for draft content

ecommerce-integration.comment: Integrations with Shopify, commercetools, Vue Storefront

analytics-integration.comment: Mission Control provides content analytics; third-party analytics integrations available

ai-features.comment: AI-assisted authoring for content generation, summaries, translations, variants, and audits; AI asset tagging and descriptions

cdn-included.comment: Built-in CDN for content delivery; cached requests have no rate limiting

response-caching.comment: CDN caching for Delivery API requests; image transformations are cached

rate-limits.comment: Delivery REST API: 100 req/s, 2000 req/min for uncached requests; no limits for cached CDN requests

global-regions.comment: Global CDN distribution; Microsoft partner with enterprise-grade infrastructure

free-tier.comment: Free trial available; pricing starts in $100-$500 range based on features

open-source.comment: Closed-source SaaS platform; SDKs and tools are open-source

pricing-model.comment: Custom pricing based on usage and features; contact sales for quotes

commercial-support.comment: Enterprise support included; dedicated customer success for enterprise customers

enterprise-features.comment: SSO/SAML, SOC 2 Type 2 compliance, advanced governance, SLA, dedicated support
